metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the resource triage and safe-search discipline signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first resource triage and safe-search discipline choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on resource triage and safe-search discipline without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: Three-room search discipline: one suspicious shelf, one hidden hatch, one objective room, and a short extraction.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Ashen Pantry variant while preserving the resource triage and safe-search discipline signal.
